official_functions.role: Construct the official minecraft:brand custom payload fixture
Write the official custom payload body bytes inside custom_payload
Construct the official Play clientbound custom_payload packet fixture
Write the official Play clientbound custom_payload body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound custom_payload frame
Read decoded custom_payload fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the custom_payload body.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundCustomPayloadPacket preserves the BrandPayload payload id and brand string produced by the official fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, custom payload body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded payload class, decoded payload id, decoded brand, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer arbitrary plugin-channel handling, payload routing policy, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
